title: Reptilator's 3D Sugarcanes
description: A simple resource pack that takes the boring sugarcanes to the 3rd Dimension!
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbe208aaa4407ee1e4a710ec196a351a8db18272.png)
Transform your Minecraft world with Reptilator's 3D Sugarcanes - a resource pack that reimagines the humble sugar cane into a vibrant, three-dimensional crop. No longer flat and lifeless, these sugar canes now stand tall with depth and realism, enhancing the visual appeal of your farms and landscapes.

### ✨ Features

- **True 3D Models**: Each sugar cane stalk is meticulously modeled to add realistic depth and dimension.
- **Enhanced Visuals**: Elevate your farming experience with lush, vibrant sugar plantations that bring your world to life.
- **Optimized Performance**: Designed to maintain smooth gameplay without compromising on visual quality.
- **Seamless Integration**: Blends perfectly with Minecraft's default textures, ensuring a harmonious look across your world.
- **Wide Compatibility**: Supports Minecraft versions 1.13 through 1.21.5.

![compar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2bd9d8cd1d8d580095ae8d93c1c5be08aa17aa9.png)
